revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-6-350

A power-operated lifting device with a jib which is capable of rotating in the horizontal plane and usually also in the vertical plane, and may be mounted on a moveable chassis.
